description_long: This desk features a robust, angular structure with a marbled gray finish, giving it a modern and industrial appearance. The front side is equipped with a raised console that includes a large, embedded digital display and a control panel with colorful buttons and indicators, suggesting a high-tech or command-oriented function. The sides of the desk are solid and thick, with the left and right panels each housing a recessed area that appears to contain additional control surfaces or touch panels. The back of the desk is plain and unadorned, emphasizing its functional orientation toward the user. The surface is broad and flat, suitable for supporting equipment or documents, while the overall build suggests durability and stability. The materials and design indicate it is intended for environments where technology and control are paramount, such as a control room or security station.
description: A modern, marbled gray desk with a raised digital console and colorful control panels, designed for high-tech or command environments. Its solid, angular build and integrated electronics suggest use in control rooms or security stations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main console with a large digital display and colorful control panel, highlighting the desk's interactive features.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing a recessed control surface and the thickness of the desk's side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back with no interactive features or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a visible control surface and solid construction.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the raised digital console and control panel, while the plain, solid side is the back. The left and right sides each feature additional control surfaces.
attribute_usage_context: command or monitoring workstation for operating electronic systems
